name: connect
description: Open a WebSocket. Events stream via `Websocket.event` (see ./event).

ConnectRequest.name: ConnectRequest
ConnectRequest.description:
sparkling-websocket — native WebSocket bridge for Sparkling.

Native platform WebSocket (OkHttp on Android, URLSession on iOS)
exposed to Lynx JS so a `WebSocket` polyfill can be installed on
`globalThis`, letting socket.io-client's websocket transport run on
PrimJS unchanged.

Each method is a one-shot request/response. Socket events stream
out-of-band through Lynx's GlobalEventEmitter — native emits the
`Websocket.event` event, JS subscribes via `pipe.on('Websocket.event')`
(see ./event). This keeps the codegen model one-response-per-method.

fields.name: socketId
fields.description: Opaque id; reused in every `Websocket.event` for this socket.
